mentions.note: Caller Andrew (NYSE member) interested in ICE / MSCI / S&P Global relationships (licensing). Cramer prefers MSCI (Henry Fernandez). Stock beaten down on AI fears (wrong). Buy on weakness.
CEO Henry Fernandez (Cramer's friend, great businessman) running gold operation; stock down on AI fears that were dead wrong; hold through volatility.
Parent of NYSE; exchange function unlikely threatened by AI; selloff unjustified but sentiment-driven; fundamental value intact.
